name: Dom Deluise's Outrageous Yum Yum Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Sift flour, baking powder and baking soda onto wax paper.
Butter and flour two 9-inch cake pans.
In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and egg until dissolved. Add butter and mix into egg mixture.
Add sour cream, water, and vanilla; blend until smooth.
CHOCOLATE BUTTER ICING: Melt chocolate chips in coffee over very low heat in a small saucepan. Remove pan from heat. Beat in butter, 1 tablespoon at a time, until smooth. Set pan on ice and beat until icing is spreadable and holds its shape.
